restaurant.name: Warung SmartBite
restaurant.reservation: Walk-in only. For groups of 8+, call ahead.

menu.name: Nasi Lemak
menu.description: Fragrant coconut rice with sambal, anchovies, peanuts, egg, and cucumber.

menu.name: Nasi Goreng
menu.description: Malaysian-style fried rice with egg, vegetables, and a choice of chicken or shrimp.

menu.name: Nasi Kandar
menu.description: Steamed rice with a variety of curries, meats, and side dishes.

menu.name: Nasi Kerabu
menu.description: Blue-tinted rice salad with herbs, fish, and a spicy dressing.

menu.name: Nasi Ayam
menu.description: Hainanese chicken rice with poached chicken, fragrant rice, and chili sauce.

menu.name: Nasi Dagang
menu.description: Glutinous rice with tuna curry, pickled vegetables, and hard-boiled egg.

menu.name: Mee Goreng
menu.description: Spicy fried yellow noodles with tofu, vegetables, and a sweet soy sauce.

menu.name: Char Kuey Teow
menu.description: Stir-fried flat rice noodles with shrimp, egg, bean sprouts, and chives.

menu.name: Laksa
menu.description: Spicy noodle soup with a rich coconut-based broth, shrimp, and tofu puffs.

menu.name: Curry Mee
menu.description: Yellow noodles in a creamy curry broth with chicken, tofu, and cockles.

menu.name: Mee Rebus
menu.description: Yellow noodles in a thick, sweet potato-based gravy with egg and tofu.

menu.name: Roti Canai
menu.description: Flaky flatbread served with dhal or curry for dipping.

menu.name: Satay
menu.description: Grilled chicken skewers marinated in spices, served with peanut sauce.

menu.name: Popiah
menu.description: Fresh spring rolls filled with jicama, carrots, tofu, and sweet sauce.

menu.name: Curry Puff
menu.description: Crispy pastry filled with curried potatoes and chicken, 3 pieces.

menu.name: Pisang Goreng
menu.description: Crispy fried banana fritters, a popular Malaysian tea-time snack.

menu.name: Teh Tarik
menu.description: Pulled milk tea, a frothy and sweet Malaysian favorite.

menu.name: Kopi
menu.description: Traditional Malaysian coffee, rich and aromatic.

menu.name: Sirap Bandung
menu.description: Rose syrup drink with evaporated milk, sweet and refreshing.

menu.name: Milo Ais
menu.description: Iced Milo chocolate malt drink, loved by all ages.

menu.name: Air Mata Kucing
menu.description: Herbal drink made from longan and winter melon, served chilled.

menu.name: Cendol
menu.description: Shaved ice dessert with green rice flour jelly, coconut milk, and palm sugar.

menu.name: Ais Kacang
menu.description: Shaved ice with red beans, sweet corn, jelly, and rose syrup.

menu.name: Kuih-muih
menu.description: Assorted traditional Malay cakes and pastries, 3 pieces.

menu.name: Pengat
menu.description: Sweet banana and yam dessert in warm coconut milk.
